title: Create Xcode project structure for macOS app - scaffold PRDesk.xcodeproj with macOS App template, Swift language, SwiftUI lifecycle
Set up basic SwiftUI app entry point - create App struct conforming to App protocol with a basic WindowGroup showing a placeholder 'PR Desk' text
Verify app builds and launches - run xcodebuild to confirm clean build, test launch shows window with placeholder text

USER ACTION REQUIRED: Install Xcode from Mac App Store or run 'sudo xcode-select -s /Applications/Xcode.app' if Xcode is already installed. Verify with 'xcodebuild -version'. This is required to build the native macOS app.

Build and launch the PRDesk macOS app to verify the project is correctly configured. Use 'xcodebuild -project PRDesk.xcodeproj -scheme PRDesk -configuration Debug build' to build. If successful, verify the app bundle is created. Acceptance: build succeeds without errors and app bundle exists.
Implement gh CLI wrapper to fetch user's authored PRs
description: Create Swift wrapper around 'gh pr list --author @me --json' to fetch PRs authored by the user. Parse JSON response into Swift model. Include acceptance: successfully fetches and parses PR list or returns empty array.

title: Implement gh CLI wrapper to fetch PRs where user is review-requested
description: Create Swift wrapper around 'gh pr list --search review-requested:@me --json' to fetch PRs where user is tagged for review. Parse JSON response into Swift model. Include acceptance: successfully fetches and parses tagged PR list or returns empty array.

title: Create PR data model and local storage
description: Define Swift struct/class for PR data (title, number, repo, author, reviewers, comments, status, lastActivity). Implement simple in-memory storage or file-based persistence. Include acceptance: model can be created from gh JSON response and persisted/retrieved.

title: Create basic data refresh mechanism
description: Implement manual refresh function that calls both gh wrappers and updates local storage. Wire to app launch. Include acceptance: app fetches PR data on launch and stores it locally. Verify with test GitHub account or mock data.
